nasb.text: But to the one who does not work, but believes in Him who justifies the ungodly, his faith is credited as righteousness,

esv.text: And to the one who does not work but believes in him who justifies the ungodly, his faith is counted as righteousness,

cnv.text: 可是，那不作工而只信那稱不敬虔的人為義的　神的，他的信就算為義了。

ccb.text: 但对于只信赦免罪人的上帝、不靠功劳的人，他的信就被算为义。

csbs.text: 但是，一个人虽没有做工，却信靠那称不敬虔之人为义的神，这人的信就被算为义。
